title: centaurea × moehrleniana
intro: Centaurea × moehrleniana, also known as cornflower or mountain cornflower, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family, with a mix of blue and white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea × moehrleniana include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
